refnamediv.refpurpose: Use with caution: Drops a topology schema and deletes its reference from topology.topology table and references to tables in that schema from the geometry_columns table.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Drops a topology schema and deletes its reference from topology.topology table and references to tables in that schema from the geometry_columns table. This function should be USED WITH CAUTION, as it could destroy data you care about. If the schema does not exist, it just removes reference entries the named schema.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.para: Cascade drops the ma_topo schema and removes all references to it in topology.topology and geometry_columns.
